name: Tze Shin International Co. Ltd.
summary: Tze Shin International Co. Ltd. primarily provides transportation services in Taiwan. The company offers cargo freight, container, truck, and oil transportation services, as well as petrochemical and damage goods transportation services; and bulk logistic services. It also engages in the development, planning, and construction of factories, shopping malls, and residential buildings; and provides ticket sales management services. The company was formerly known as Tze Shin Transportation & Terminal Co.Ltd and changed its name to Tze Shin International Co. Ltd. in July 2002. Tze Shin International was founded in 1973 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
